title: Xcode Debug Memory Graph
description: Enable logging and configuration for Xcode Memory Graph to help locate memory objects and leaks.
content:
This feature is familiar to everyone. However, when using it, you can only see the graph structure, not the stack trace on the code symbols.

Here's a way to enable it.

Open the Schema settings, click Diagnostics, find Login and check it, then select All Allocation and Free Historey.

Rerun it and see if you get the desired result.
